About

Where Precision Meets People

I am a proactive, detail-oriented professional combining a strong foundation in Computer Science with genuine expertise in office administration, HR operations, and quality assurance. My approach is built on one principle — doing things right the first time, every time.

With over a year managing end-to-end administrative workflows, coordinating high-volume recruitment, and earning dual awards for performance and communication, I bring both reliability and initiative to every role I take on.

Currently exploring opportunities across the UAE and Gulf region, I am committed to contributing to an organisation that values precision, efficiency, and continuous growth.

🗂 Office Administration

End-to-end admin support for senior executives — scheduling, correspondence, records, reports

👥 HR & Recruitment

10+ vacancies managed · 100+ resumes screened · 30+ interviews coordinated · 10+ onboardings

💻 Tech-Enabled

MS Office with AI · Google Workspace · Playwright automation · TestRail · Katalon Studio

🌍 UAE / Gulf Ready

Open to relocation · Visa sponsorship welcome · Available to join immediately

Career

Professional Experience

Software Tester Intern
Mar 2026 — Present
Qtest Solutions · Kozhikode, Kerala, India
  • Execute manual test cases across multiple modules using structured test plans and STLC methodology
  • Build automation scripts with Playwright (Python) and Pytest, reducing regression testing effort significantly
  • Maintain detailed defect logs and test execution reports in TestRail for complete QA traceability
  • Evaluate AI-assisted test generation in Katalon Studio to optimise workflow efficiency
  • Develop end-to-end test suites covering scenario design, case execution and defect documentation
Office Executive
Apr 2025 — Mar 2026
Placementor Academy · Manjeri, Kerala, India · 1 Year
  • Managed end-to-end office administration for 2 senior executives — scheduling, correspondence, document management & daily operational support
  • Handled recruitment for 10+ vacancies: job postings, candidate sourcing, resume screening, interview coordination & onboarding support
  • Screened 100+ resumes and contacted 20+ candidates to assess eligibility and schedule interviews
  • Coordinated 30+ interviews between candidates and hiring managers, ensuring a smooth and timely process
  • Conducted 10+ employee onboarding sessions ensuring seamless joining experience and full documentation compliance
  • Maintained confidential HR records for 30 employees ensuring accuracy, compliance and easy accessibility
  • Drafted 20+ professional business emails daily while preparing 5–10 administrative reports monthly
Business Administration Intern
Aug 2024 — Apr 2025
Skillage Academy · Malappuram, Kerala, India · 9 Months
